name: STATICPLUGIN
description: [STATICPLUGIN](https://attack.mitre.org/software/S1238) is a downloader known to be leveraged by [Mustang Panda](https://attack.mitre.org/groups/G0129) and was first observed utilized in 2025.  [STATICPLUGIN](https://attack.mitre.org/software/S1238) has utilized a valid certificate in order to bypass endpoint security protections.  [STATICPLUGIN](https://attack.mitre.org/software/S1238) masquerade
